meta.title: CNAPP Services | GuidePoint Security
meta.description: Cloud-native growth demands security first. Our CNAPP services safeguard every layer of your cloud apps, delivering visibility, control, and proactive threat protection to drive secure innovation and meet your goals with confidence.

sections.domClasses: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-432e8ced services-review-process elementor-section-full_width elementor-section-height-default watching-viewport in-view
paragraphs: Our CNAPP Enablement Services empower your organization to fully secure cloud-native applications at every development and deployment phase. With reduced risks and enhanced protection, you can confidently maximize the flexibility and scalability of the cloud to drive innovation and growth.
Put your trust in a team of cloud security experts to guide you through a structured CNAPP implementation, customized to your organization’s unique needs:
Our experts work closely with your security, development and operations teams to build a holistic CNAPP strategy, ensuring every layer of your cloud application is protected.

items: Threat Detection and Response: Continuous real-time monitoring to detect and respond to security events
Vulnerability Management: Automated tools and processes to identify, assess and remediate vulnerabilities across cloud environments
Identity and Access Management: Robust controls for identity verification, access permissions and user management to reduce unauthorized access risks
Compliance and Governance: Frameworks and policies to ensure adherence to regulatory requirements and internal security standards

sections.domClasses: elementor-section elementor-top-section elementor-element elementor-element-eff1d91 elementor-section-full_width services-review-process elementor-section-height-default watching-viewport in-view
paragraphs: Our custom services bring comprehensive protection to your cloud-native application. Whether you need help identifying the right CNAPP solution, implementing and customizing it or optimizing and maintaining it, we provide comprehensive, adaptable support. With our expertise, you gain a partner committed to securing your operations, simplifying complexity and ensuring peace of mind in an evolving threat landscape. What you can expect:

items: Enhanced Threat Visibility: Gain full visibility into your cloud applications, identifying vulnerabilities and misconfigurations before they become threats
Streamlined Compliance: Simplify regulatory compliance with automated policy enforcement and continuous monitoring
Optimized Cloud Security Operations: Integrate and automate security workflows to enhance operational efficiency across your cloud environments
Proactive Mitigation: Shift to a proactive security approach, identifying and addressing risks earlier in the development lifecycle

paragraphs: The short answer: expertise tailored to your industry. Our team of cybersecurity engineers, architects and consultants brings unmatched expertise to address your industry’s specific challenges, from meeting regulatory compliance in finance to securing sensitive healthcare data and driving innovation in tech. We design tailored solutions that safeguard your cloud-native applications while optimizing your cloud environment.
CNAPP Certifications

images.alt: GPS Certified Azure Security Engineer Associate
